entry.title: New: CR 25-72 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending the following: 1. ADOPTION of Resolution 25-193, CD1, to authorize the Mayor to request that the Governor designate the proposed Nāpili Enterprise Zone on Maui Island for a 20-year period; and 2. ADOPTION of Resolution 25-194, CD1, to authorize the Mayor to request that the Governor redesignate the Greater Maui Enterprise Zone on Maui Island, with proposed adjustments, for a 20-year period. Resolution 25-194, CD1, was adopted at the 11/7/2025 Council Meeting.

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
